name: Nadeshiko Oomuro
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Sakurako's older sister. name: Pit
description: Pit is the protagonist of the Kid Icarus series. He first appeared in Kid Icarus for the Nintendo Entertainment System in 1986, followed by an appearance in Kid Icarus: Of Myths and Monsters for the Game Boy in 1991. Other than a handful of cameos, Pit didn't make another major appearance until the release of Super Smash Bros. Brawl in 2008, and again in the 2012 Nintendo 3DS title Kid Icarus: Uprising. name: Taichi Kawanishi
description: __Height:__ 188.3 cm (6' 2.1") __Hometown:__ Miyagi Prefecture __Introduction:__ Taichi Kawanishi is a second year middle blocker at Shiratorizawa Academy. __Personality:__ He doesn't talk to his teammates very often, and appears mostly emotionless, only looking annoyed on occasion. He has been seen crying once. He doesn't seem to put much effort into his playing and sometimes accidentally lets a ball in; however, since he's a starting member in Shiratorizawa, his abilities shouldn't be too low.

name: Taichi Kawasumi
description: Kawasumi is a 15 year old student who attends Shuudai High. He is childhood friends with Ryosuke, and he is most attracted to the popular Suiren. Kawasumi is particularly talented in karate as he can easily defeat 3 attackers at the same time, and he was also the champion of a particular tournament (chapter 18). name: Takao Yaguchi
description: After Punpun breaks up with Aiko, Aiko asks Yaguchi to be her boyfriend; however, their relationship appears as quite uncomfortable. Yaguchi plays for his school's badminton team, but an injury prevents him from reaching his full potential.

name: Takatora Fujimoto
description: Fujimoto works in the same hospital as his teammates in Hoshishiro, and he is very loyal to Nagamasa Midori, and is also verbal abused by his other teammate Ichi Akabane. He is known as the Assault Destroyer, being able to defeat enemies quickly and without them feeling the pain. He carries a machine gun which weighs 20 kg but doesn't put him in a disadvantage.
